title: KitchenPerfected 4 Slice Long Slot Toaster - Black - E2112BK
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: LARGE TOASTING SLOTS: The two large slots can accommodate up to four slices of bread at once, perfect for breakfast time with the family or for when you fancy a couple of extra slices!
COOL TOUCH: Ideal for family kitchens, busy work surfaces and confined spaces; the cool touch safety feature will keep the outside of the toaster at a safe temperature, preventing burns when touched.
7 BROWNING CONTROL SETTINGS: Toast your bread to perfection with the easy to use dial, you can choose from levels 1 to 7 for your desired result!

SLIDE OUT CRUMB TRAY: Keep your appliance clean and crumb free without making a mess on your counter top! Simply slide the tray out and discard of the crumbs with zero hassle. Not only will this help to clean the appliance but it also reduces the risk of fire.
description: Toast up to four slices of bread at once with this toaster, perfect for larger appetites and family meal times. Equipped with seven browning control settings for toast just the way you like it! The dial which is easy to use can be adjusted from levels 1 to 7 according to your preference. Tthe cancel button; this handy function will turn off the element and pop your toast up immediately which can come in handy when you need to dash or think you may be burning it! To keep your toaster in good working order and to produce the optimum results you should clean the appliance frequently; the design includes a slide-out crumb tray which can be easily removed allowing you to discard crumbs with zero hassle. Box Includes KitchenPerfected 4 Slice Long Slot Toaster Instruction Manual Note Do not use over sized bread in the toasters.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Bread Size: 120 x 85mm, Cancel Function, Cool Touch Exterior, Variable Browning Control
